query:
-- Add TIAB as a supplier account (account number 100998)
INSERT INTO supplier_accounts (accountNumber, supplierName, serviceCount, monthlyCost)
VALUES ('100998', 'TIAB', 113, 6581.50)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE supplierName='TIAB', serviceCount=113, monthlyCost=6581.50;

-- Update the 113 TIAB services with per-service cost from Feb 2026 invoice
-- $6,581.50 ex GST / 113 services = $58.24 per service
UPDATE services 
SET monthlyCost = ROUND(6581.50 / 113, 2)
WHERE provider = 'TIAB';

-- Update the 113 TIAB services with per-service cost from Feb 2026 invoice
